sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Stifel Cuts PT on Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX)- Here’s Why
feed.summary: Stifel cut its price target on Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) to $65 from $75, while reaffirming a Buy rating, citing factors like negative reactions to recent datasets and capacity constraints for Watchman growth slowing. Separately, BofA also reduced its price target to $61 from $68, maintaining a Buy rating, due to a lower utilization environment and a more conservative view on 2027 medtech estimates. Boston Scientific manufactures medical devices across cardiovascular and MedSurg segments.

feed.title: Timberlands from Weyerhaeuser Co. - quiet backbone of US wood supply
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Co.'s Timberlands, spanning nearly 11 million acres, are presented as the quiet backbone of the US wood supply, feeding various industries. The article details how these sustainably managed forests function as a product, from their management and harvesting to their role in the company's financial performance and as a carbon asset. It highlights their importance to investors and the broader US economy.

feed.title: Quest Resource (QRHC) CFO reports routine tax-withholding share disposition
feed.summary: Quest Resource Holding Corp's CFO, Brett Wade Johnston, had 1,623 shares of common stock withheld on June 26, 2026, at $1.24 per share to cover tax obligations. This disposition was a routine tax-withholding event, not an open-market sale, and resulted in him directly holding 91,727 common shares, including RSUs and DSUs. The Form 4 filing details his remaining holdings and unvested equity awards.

feed.title: Xos Releases White Paper Mapping LA28’s 588 MWh Zero-Emission Charging Gap
feed.summary: Xos, Inc. has released a white paper, "Powering the Games: A Fleet Charging Solution for LA 2028," highlighting a significant challenge in providing zero-emission charging infrastructure for the upcoming Olympic and Paralympic Games. The paper argues that conventional fixed charging solutions are not feasible for many temporary venues due to strict permitting timelines and high costs, proposing mobile battery energy storage via the Xos Hub™ as a ready alternative. Xos already has eight Hub units deployed with LADWP, demonstrating the viability of their solution for the estimated 588 MWh daily charging demand across the Games' 40+ venues.

feed.title: W. P. Carey (NYSE: WPC) to refinance 2026 notes with $350M issue
feed.summary: W. P. Carey Inc. announced the pricing of a $350 million aggregate principal amount of 5.200% Senior Notes due 2036. The company intends to use the net proceeds from this offering primarily to repay its existing $350 million of 4.250% Senior Notes due October 2026, and for other general corporate purposes. The offering is expected to settle on July 2, 2026, with interest on the new notes paid semi-annually.

feed.title: Champion Safe and Dave Kindig Announce Custom Safes
feed.summary: Champion Safe, American Rebel, and Kindig-It Design have partnered to launch a new line of ultra-premium custom safes. These safes will combine Champion's high-security features with Dave Kindig's iconic custom automotive design aesthetic, targeting collectors and enthusiasts. The collaboration emphasizes American craftsmanship, bold design, and serious protection, embodying shared values of quality and patriotic pride.

feed.title: U.S. Indexes Rose Tuesday; ViaSat Topped Leaders
feed.summary: U.S. stock indexes closed higher on Tuesday, with the NASDAQ Composite Index gaining 1.52%. The S&P 500 Index also increased by 0.79%, and the Dow saw a rise of 0.26%. ViaSat was noted as a top leader for the day.

feed.title: Advanced Biomed (NASDAQ: ADVB) selling Taiwan R&D subsidiary for $490K
feed.summary: Advanced Biomed Inc. (NASDAQ: ADVB) is selling its wholly-owned Taiwan R&D subsidiary, which focuses on biomedical research and development and the A+PerfusC 3D cell culture platform, for $490,000 to an unrelated third party. The transaction, reported in an 8-K filing, is expected to close within three months from June 30, 2026. Following the sale, Advanced Biomed will concentrate on its remaining businesses, including AI-focused operations through Acellent Technologies (Hong Kong) Co. Limited.

feed.title: Liquidity Services (LQDT) EVP Daunt logs tiny share sale and option exercise
feed.summary: Liquidity Services EVP John Daunt reported a routine equity compensation activity involving a small sale and an option exercise. The Daunt family trust sold 39.09 shares of common stock at $39.09 per share and subsequently acquired 3,287 common shares through the exercise of stock options at $21.62 per share. Following these transactions, the trust holds 41,373 shares, and Daunt continues to hold numerous stock option and restricted stock unit grants, many of which are performance-based.

feed.title: Kroger buying Market District owner Giant Eagle for $1.65 billion
feed.summary: Kroger announced its acquisition of Giant Eagle, owner of Market District supermarkets, for $1.65 billion. This deal, comprising $1.2 billion in cash and $400 million in assumed liabilities, will expand Kroger's presence into new markets, including Indiana, Maryland, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and West Virginia. The transaction is expected to close in 2027, though some stores may need to be divested for regulatory approval.

feed.title: Cencora lines up Aug. 5 earnings call before NYSE opens
feed.summary: Cencora, Inc. (NYSE: COR) announced it will release its Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 results on Wednesday, August 5, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. The company will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results, with President & CEO Robert P. Mauch and EVP & CFO Eva C. Boratto participating. A live webcast and replay will be available on Cencora's investor relations website, investor.cencora.com.

feed.title: Form 4 APA Corporation For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article from Investing.com announces a Form 4 filing for APA Corporation for July 1st. It is a brief news flash primarily focused on this single corporate financial disclosure. The article includes various unrelated market data, news headlines, and navigational links.

feed.title: Newmont Announces Second Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation will release its second quarter 2026 results after North American markets close on Thursday, July 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results will be held at 5:30 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time on the same day. Webcast details and registration for analysts are provided.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE: IR) announced it will release its second quarter 2026 earnings on Thursday, July 30, 2026, after market close. The company will also host a live earnings conference call on Friday, July 31, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET to discuss the results. Interested parties can access the webcast and related materials via the Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Centene Corp. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Centene Corp. (CNC) saw its stock rise by 6.48% to $68.35 on Wednesday, despite a general market downturn where the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average both experienced slight declines. This performance broke a two-day losing streak for the company. The strong trading day for Centene Corp. indicates a notable outperformance compared to its market competitors.

feed.title: FactSet Research Systems Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) saw its stock advance 6.72% to $245.55 on Wednesday, outperforming the broader market which experienced a dismal trading session. The S&P 500 Index fell 0.22% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped 0.03%, despite FDS's strong performance, it closed 45.84% below its 52-week high.

feed.title: Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac open 12 years of FICO 10T loan data
feed.summary: FICO announced that Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac have released over a decade of historical loan-level performance data for FICO Score 10T, spanning from April 2013 to September 2025. This critical step in mortgage industry modernization allows lenders, investors, and housing finance stakeholders to evaluate FICO Score 10T's performance using real-world GSE data. FICO Score 10T, which incorporates trended credit data and rental payment history, is touted as the most predictive credit score model available and aims to expand borrower access while ensuring a resilient housing finance system.

feed.title: UBS (AMUB) launches GOOGL‑linked auto‑callable securities with 10.05% coupon
feed.summary: UBS AG has launched new Contingent Income Auto-Callable Securities linked to Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) Class A common stock, offering an annual contingent payment of 10.05% ($25.125 per security) if GOOGL's closing price is at or above 60% of its initial price on specified determination dates. These securities, expected to price on July 10, 2026, and mature around July 13, 2029, can be redeemed early if GOOGL's price meets the call threshold, but investors face capital loss if the final price falls below the downside threshold and do not participate in stock appreciation. The offering highlights various risks, including credit risk of UBS, potential for loss of principal, and limited secondary market liquidity.

feed.title: Walmart offers optician training program to employees
feed.summary: Walmart has launched an "Associate to Optician" training program to address labor shortages in the optical industry. This program allows current employees to earn a fully funded associate degree in Optical Science, with licensed opticians at Walmart earning significantly higher wages than the average hourly rate. The initiative mirrors Walmart's existing "Associate to Technician" and "Associate to Driver" programs, demonstrating the company's commitment to employee career development amidst increasing demand for optical services due to an aging population and chronic health conditions.

feed.title: Apple ‘in negotiations’ with two banned Chinese RAM firms after price increases
feed.summary: Apple is reportedly in negotiations to purchase RAM from two Chinese semiconductor manufacturers, ChangXin Memory Technologies Inc. (CXMT) and Yangtze Memory Technologies Co. (YMTC), both of which are on the Pentagon's ban list. This move is driven by a global memory shortage that has forced Apple to raise prices on products like Macs and iPads, and would likely require special clearance from the U.S. government. The iPhone maker aims to secure components for devices sold in China and mitigate further price increases, with new iPhone models also expected to cost more.

feed.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) director adds 146 phantom share equivalents
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Corp director Charles L. Harrington reported acquiring 146 phantom share equivalents, valued at $248.37 each, under a non-qualified deferred compensation plan. This transaction increased his total balance to 5,345 units, which track the company's stock price and will be cash-settled upon his service termination. The balance also includes approximately 8 share equivalents from dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Missouri American Water (NYSE: AWK) files $179M rate request tied to $1.6B capex
feed.summary: Missouri American Water, a subsidiary of American Water Works (NYSE: AWK), has filed a rate request with the Missouri Public Service Commission for approximately $179 million in annualized incremental revenue. This request is primarily driven by $1.6 billion in planned and completed capital investments from June 2025 through May 2028, aimed at upgrading water and wastewater systems across Missouri. If approved, average residential customer bills could increase by $15 to $23 per month, with new rates potentially taking effect in June 2027.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Inc Stock (TMUS) Closed Up by 3.23% on Jul 1: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: T-Mobile US Inc (TMUS) saw its stock close up by 3.23% on July 1st, rebounding from a recent 52-week low despite concerns over Starlink competition and customer backlash from legacy plan migrations. Analysts maintain a bullish outlook based on the company's strong profitability and favorable valuation multiples, viewing the recent sell-off as an attractive entry point for long-term investors. Immediate technical indicators show a sell signal (MACD), neutral condition (RSI), and oversold condition (Williams %R).

feed.title: S&P Global Inc Stock (SPGI) Closed Up by 7.99% on Jul 1: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: S&P Global Inc. (SPGI) stock closed up 7.99% on July 1, primarily driven by the successful spinoff of its Mobility division into an independent entity, Mobility Global Inc. This strategic move is expected to streamline S&P Global's focus on its core competencies in ratings, indices, and market intelligence, unlocking significant shareholder value. Despite some historical macroeconomic and AI disruption concerns, the post-spinoff valuation reset and strong demand for investment-grade debt issuance have spurred renewed buying interest, positioning the company as a focused, capital-efficient market leader.

feed.title: LDOS Maintained by Jefferies -- Price Target Lowered to $110
feed.summary: Jefferies has maintained a Hold rating on Leidos Holdings (LDOS) but lowered its price target from $140.00 to $110.00, reflecting a 21.43% decrease. Despite this, GuruFocus assesses LDOS as 37.6% undervalued with a GF Value™ of $167.15 against a current price of $104.27, and it holds a GF Score™ of 72/100, indicating solid financial metrics but low momentum. Insider selling has also been noted in the past three months.

feed.title: Form 144: Affiliate account and Indelicarto sell shares (VRSN)
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing indicates that Morgan Stanley Smith Barney, acting for an affiliate account of Verisign Inc. (VRSN), proposes to sell 250 shares. Additionally, Thomas C. Indelicarto has recently disposed of multiple blocks of shares, totaling 1996 shares across four separate transactions between April and June 2026, with reported proceeds for each sale. These are routine regulatory disclosures under Rule 144 for compliance purposes.

feed.title: Genworth trims Enact Holdings (ACT) stake with 605K-share buyback sale
feed.summary: Genworth Holdings, a major shareholder in Enact Holdings, reported selling 605,067 shares of Enact common stock at $42.277 per share on June 30, 2026. This transaction was part of a Share Repurchase Agreement between Enact and Genworth, reducing Genworth's direct holdings to 111,601,572 Enact shares, though it still owns approximately 81% of Enact's outstanding common stock. The sale price was determined by the weighted average price Enact paid for shares purchased from third parties.

feed.title: Occidental sets Aug. 6 call for Q2 2026 results
feed.summary: Occidental (NYSE: OXY) announced that its second quarter 2026 financial results will be released after market close on Wednesday, August 5, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for Thursday, August 6, 2026, at 1 p.m. Eastern Time. Investors can access the call via phone or webcast, with details available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Alamo Group pays July 29 dividend of $0.34 a share
feed.summary: Alamo Group (NYSE: ALG) has announced that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share. This dividend is payable on July 29, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on July 16, 2026. The company, established in 1969, specializes in industrial and vegetation management equipment, employing approximately 3,800 people across 27 manufacturing facilities globally.

feed.title: Actelis wins $850K renewal tied to a critical carrier network
feed.summary: Actelis Networks (OTCQB: ASNS) announced an approximately $850,000 one-year renewal for software licenses and services from a major North American carrier. This agreement includes maintenance, disaster-readiness support, and an upgraded, cyber-hardened Meta-Assist EMS, reinforcing Actelis's role in the carrier's network modernization. The renewal highlights the continued adoption of Actelis's hybrid fiber-copper platforms, including its MetaLIGHT solution for T1-to-fiber convergence.

feed.title: American Healthcare REIT Announces Dates for Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: American Healthcare REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AHR) announced it will release its second quarter 2026 earnings on Thursday, August 6, 2026, after market close. A public conference call and webcast to discuss these results will take place on Friday, August 7, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time / 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The company's executives will review the results, discuss recent events, and answer questions during the call.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries, Inc. Invites You to Join its Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries, Inc. has invited stakeholders to join its Second Quarter 2026 earnings conference call, scheduled for July 31, 2026, at 11:00 am ET. The call will follow the earnings release on July 30, 2026, and will be accessible via webcast and live conference lines. A replay will be available until August 28, 2026, and an archived version will be accessible for one year on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: KKR & Co. Inc. to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: KKR & Co. Inc. announced its plans to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on Thursday, July 30, 2026, before the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. A conference call for investors and media will be held on the same day at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss the results. The call details and webcast link are provided for participants.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Information
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBHT) has announced that it will release its second quarter 2026 earnings after market close on Wednesday, July 15, 2026. The company will also host a conference call and webcast on the same day from 4:00-5:00 p.m. CDT to discuss the results and answer questions from investors. The webcast and replay will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Apogee closes $115M Kalwall deal, adding daylighting products
feed.summary: Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) has completed its acquisition of Kalwall Companies for up to $115 million. This strategic move aims to strengthen Apogee's position in attractive end markets by adding Kalwall's differentiated daylighting capabilities and strong architectural relationships. Apogee Executive Chair and CEO Don Nolan stated the acquisition advances their strategy and is expected to create long-term value for stakeholders.

feed.title: Protagonist Therapeutics Reports Granting of Inducement Awards
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics, Inc. reported granting inducement awards to three new employees on June 30, 2026, under their Amended and Restated Inducement Plan. The awards include options to purchase 8,650 shares and restricted stock units for 2,275 shares of common stock, with an option exercise price of $122.58. These awards were made as a material inducement for their employment, vesting over a four-year period.

feed.title: Allison Transmission Holdings Set to Join S&P MidCap 400 and Goodyear Tire & Rubber to Join S&P SmallCap 600
feed.summary: Allison Transmission Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ALSN) is set to replace Goodyear Tire & Rubber Co. (NASD: GT) in the S&P MidCap 400. Concurrently, Goodyear Tire & Rubber will join the S&P SmallCap 600, replacing Stellar Bancorp Inc. (NYSE: STEL), following Prosperity Bancshares Inc.'s (NYSE: PB) acquisition of Stellar Bancorp. These changes will become effective prior to the opening of trading on Monday, July 6, 2026.

feed.title: Benjamin Silbermann lists multiple Class A share sales for Pinterest (NYSE: PINS)
feed.summary: Pinterest (NYSE: PINS) affiliate Benjamin Silbermann has filed a Form 144, indicating proposed sales of Class A Common Stock across multiple dates in May and June 2026. The filing details various lots, including 8,414 shares on May 21, 2026, and several entries of 46,875 shares in June 2026, with corresponding dollar amounts. This routine disclosure is a notice of intended resale by an affiliate and does not necessarily equate to completed sales or impact the company's outstanding share count directly.

feed.title: N.J. castle hotel built with over 1 million bricks just got prestigious new name
feed.summary: A castle-inspired hotel in Parsippany, New Jersey, originally built in 1987 with over a million bricks, has been rebranded from a Sheraton to a Dolce by Wyndham Parsippany. The hotel, known for its unique design and large facilities, is now part of Wyndham's upscale Dolce Hotels and Resorts brand, a significant change noted by its original builder.

feed.title: Missouri American Water Files Rate Request Driven by Approximately $1.6 Billion in Investments to Provide Safe, Clean, Reliable and Affordable Service – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Missouri American Water has filed a rate request with the Missouri Public Service Commission (MoPSC) to support approximately $1.6 billion in water and wastewater system investments from June 2025 through May 2028. These investments aim to modernize infrastructure, enhance water quality and reliability for over 1.7 million people, and address regulatory requirements. If approved, the average residential water bill could increase by $15-$23 per month, with options available for income-eligible customers.

feed.title: Missouri water bills could rise as $1.6B upgrade plan goes to regulators
feed.summary: Missouri American Water has filed a rate request with the Missouri Public Service Commission (MoPSC) to cover approximately $1.6 billion in investments for water and wastewater system upgrades between June 2025 and May 2028. These investments are aimed at improving water quality, reliability, and regulatory compliance, including addressing PFAS. If approved, the average residential water bill in St. Louis County could increase by about $23 per month, and by $15 per month for customers outside the county, with new rates potentially taking effect by June 2027.

feed.title: Should You Buy Wix.com Ltd. (WIX)’s Shares?
feed.summary: Wix.com Ltd. (NASDAQ:WIX) has seen a significant drop in its share price, down 71% over the past year and 55% year-to-date, despite efforts to integrate AI into its platforms. The company recently partnered with OpenAI for its Codex Enterprise platform and Microsoft for its 365 Copilot, aiming to enhance user experience within these ecosystems. While acknowledging the risks, the article suggests that other AI stocks might offer greater return potential.

feed.title: Zumiez CFO Christopher Work announces resignation after 19 years
feed.summary: Zumiez Inc. announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Christopher C. Work, plans to resign after 19 years with the company. Work will continue in his role during the transition period while Zumiez searches for a successor with the help of an executive search firm. No specific timeline for the new CFO's appointment has been provided.

feed.title: Enterprise value to revenue forward of Allarity Therapeutics, Inc. – NASDAQ:ALLR
feed.summary: This article focuses on the enterprise value to revenue forward metric for Allarity Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALLR). It appears to be a financial data point presented on TradingView, serving as part of the company's financial overview. The content primarily consists of navigation, disclaimers, and acknowledgments of data providers related to the TradingView platform itself.

feed.title: Biogen (NASDAQ: BIIB) projects large 2026 R&D milestone charges hitting EPS
feed.summary: Biogen (NASDAQ: BIIB) has announced that it expects significant one-time R&D milestone charges to impact its earnings in the second and third quarters of 2026. The company anticipates a $164 million expense in Q2, reducing diluted EPS by approximately $0.95, and a $290 million to $320 million expense in Q3, lowering EPS by $1.75 to $1.95. These charges stem from collaboration and license agreements, including upfront and milestone payments for acquired in-process research and development.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Stock Has Lagged Other Banks. Earnings Can Change That.
feed.summary: Wells Fargo's stock has underperformed compared to other banks, but its upcoming earnings report on July 14th could change that. The financial institution's earnings are expected to be favorable, particularly given areas where expectations are currently subdued. This positive report has the potential to boost its shares, which are considered to be cheaply priced.

feed.title: KTOS (NASDAQ: KTOS) Form 144 lists 4,675 shares; insider 10b5-1 sales recorded
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing for Kratos Defense & Security Solutions (NASDAQ: KTOS) indicates a proposed sale of 4,675 shares of Common Stock, categorized as Performance Stock Units. The filing also discloses two prior 10b5-1 insider sales by Stacey Rock, totaling 4,000 shares on April 28, 2026, for $244,100.00, and another 4,000 shares on May 28, 2026, for $261,872.00. This filing provides transparency regarding planned share dispositions and past insider transactions under a 10b5-1 plan.

feed.title: Travelers (NYSE: TRV) director Elizabeth Robinson receives deferred stock unit grant
feed.summary: Travelers Companies director Elizabeth Robinson received a grant of 132.53 deferred common stock units on June 30, 2026, in lieu of cash fees, under the company’s Deferred Compensation Plan for Non-Employee Directors. Each unit will convert into one share of common stock upon distribution. Following this award and additional units from dividend reinvestment, her total holdings now amount to 12,561.986 deferred common stock units, valued at $330.12 per unit.

feed.title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Gets Downgraded by Evercore ISI – Here’s Why
feed.summary: Evercore ISI downgraded TE Connectivity (NYSE:TEL) to "In Line" from "Outperform," lowering the price target to $230 from $260. The firm cited that the stock's current valuation already reflects its long-term potential, despite structural growth drivers from AI and energy. Evercore ISI noted a less favorable 12-month risk/reward outlook, as AI currently constitutes a small portion of TE Connectivity's revenue.

feed.title: Aerospace Opportunities Affirm PPG Industries, Inc. (PPG) as One of the Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy
feed.summary: PPG Industries, Inc. (NYSE: PPG) is identified as a top dividend aristocrat stock, with BMO Capital analyst John McNulty reiterating an Outperform rating and raising the price target to $140. The company's growth potential is highlighted by its strategic focus on the aerospace sector, including commercial and military opportunities, through innovation and capacity expansion. PPG Industries is a global manufacturer of paints, coatings, and specialty materials across various industries.
